page: Alibaba Cloud ecs.r7t.8xlarge is a memory-optimized virtual machine instance belonging to the ecs.r7t family. It is powered by an Intel Xeon 8369B processor running at 2.7 GHz on the x86_64 architecture. The instance features 32 dedicated physical cores and 32 vCPUs, operating with 1.0 thread per core. It is equipped with 256.0 GB of RAM, providing a high memory-to-vCPU ratio of 8.0 GB per core, making it suitable for memory-intensive workloads. The underlying hypervisor is KVM.

This instance does not include local storage, requiring network-attached storage solutions. Network connectivity is supported by a baseline bandwidth of 16 Gbps. The processor supports advanced instruction sets, including AVX, AVX-512F, AVX-512_VNNI, AES, VAES, and SHA_NI, which accelerate cryptographic and vector-based calculations. In benchmark evaluations, the ecs.r7t.8xlarge demonstrates solid performance, achieving a Geekbench multi-core score of 13842.0 and a Passmark CPU score of 36647.59. Memory bandwidth tests show a read-only large block speed of 153.12 GB/sec and a write speed of 68.8 GB/sec.

The instance is highly capable for database operations, as evidenced by a Passmark database score of 14663.56 and a Redis SET throughput of 31.33 million operations per second. It also exhibits strong performance in text generation for small language models, processing 312.77 tokens per second with a 135M model. Given its high memory density and dedicated CPU allocation, the ecs.r7t.8xlarge is well-suited for large-scale databases, in-memory caching, enterprise applications, and memory-heavy data processing tasks.
description: Alibaba Cloud ecs.r7t.8xlarge is an x86_64 memory-optimized instance featuring 32 dedicated Intel Xeon 8369B physical cores and 32 vCPUs running at 2.7 GHz. It is equipped with 256.0 GB of RAM, offering a high 8.0 GB of memory per core, but does not include local storage. Network performance is supported by a baseline bandwidth of 16 Gbps. The instance delivers solid benchmark results, including a Passmark CPU score of 36647.59 and a Redis SET throughput of 31.33 million operations per second. It also demonstrates strong text generation capabilities for small language models at 312.77 tokens per second. With its dedicated CPU allocation and high memory capacity, this instance is designed for memory-intensive workloads such as in-memory databases, caching layers, and enterprise applications.
og_description: Alibaba Cloud ecs.r7t.8xlarge is a memory-optimized instance with 32 dedicated Intel Xeon vCPUs, 256 GB RAM, and 16 Gbps baseline bandwidth, designed for database and memory-intensive enterprise workloads.

tagline: A memory-optimized virtual server featuring dedicated Intel Xeon processors and high memory density for enterprise databases and caching.
